positive: A stylized illustration of a whimsical mountain range under a gradient sky at twilight. The mountains should have clean, geometric silhouettes in deep blues, purples, and teal, contrasting sharply against warm oranges, yellows, and soft pinks of the sunset. Incorporate abstract, floating celestial elements like stylized nebulas, geometric constellations, and stylized crescent moons. The overall style must be modern graphic design, vector illustration quality, with perfect symmetry and strong central composition. Isolated background suitable for apparel printing, flat vector aesthetic.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, photorealistic, smoke, gradient (on subject), text, watermark, signature, logo, writing, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, messy, cartoonish, messy lines
